top_signals.title: Trump’s promise on Patriots will take time, leaving Ukraine facing tough choices
top_signals.summary: Experts say the time needed to build an assembly plant and organize contractors means production will not start soon enough to ease ⁠Ukraine's situation in the near future.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Guardian Metal, Montana Mining Association forge US tungsten processing alliance
top_signals.summary: First shipments of legacy ore are expected by late summer 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
